summary: Added a dedicated answer-quality gate for DinoBrain OS completion: local paired memory-on/off generated-answer evaluation, status artifact, health/freshness wiring, Observatory readiness exposure, verify:goal requirement, and updated unfinished-work contract.
decisions: Treat generated-answer memory-on/off quality as a separate hard gate instead of inferring it from rag_eval_status.
Keep the new judge honest as deterministic local Ragas-like evidence and leave external Ragas/LLM-judge calibration as representative-eval follow-up.
Do not claim the full closed-loop goal complete while fresh Codex Desktop live hook proof is missing for this old thread.
next_steps: Create a fresh Codex Desktop workspace thread after hook reload and rerun npm run verify:goal to satisfy the remaining live pre-response proof blocker.
Add explicit answer-quality-golden.json and broader representative cases beyond behavior-golden fallback.
